signals.name: AcceleratorPedalPressed
signals.comment: Active only when driver actually presses the pedal

signals.name: ThrottlelPressed
signals.comment: Active when accelerator pedal pressed or cruise control: drives

signals.name: Counter_404
signals.comment: Message is sent at higher rate when cruise stalk is pressed

signals.name: Cancel_request_up_stalk
signals.comment: Appears when cancel stalk (up) is depressed

signals.name: Resume_request
signals.comment: It appears when resume stalk button is depressed

signals.name: Cancel_request_up_or_down_stalk
signals.comment: Appears when cancel stalk (up or down) is depressed

signals.name: EngineTorque
signals.comment: Engine torque without inertia - combustion torque

signals.name: EngineTorqueWoInterv
signals.comment: Engine torque without inertia and without shift intervention

signals.name: BrakePressed
signals.comment: Brake when driver presses the brake or hill hold

signals.name: CruiseControlSetpointSpeed
signals.comment: Speed target - unit depends on locale

signals.name: GearTar
signals.comment: Values corresponds to forward gears. TBD Add enums for park, reverse

signals.name: ShiftLeverMode
signals.comment: On the dashboard, there are displayed:  D1...D7 in Normal. S1...S6 in Sport.  M1..M7 in Manual

signals.name: HoldActivated
signals.comment: Spikes down if blinker cleared with timeout or turn. Stays off if blinker cleared with stalk

signals.name: RightTurn
signals.comment: Indicates right blinker or when steering returning right clears left blinker

signals.name: LeftTurn
signals.comment: Indicates left blinker or when steering returning left clears right blinker

signals.name: DTC_pressed
signals.comment: Traction control off. Message transmitted when pressed. Few presses may be required followed by off.
